title: crotalaria bupleurifolia var. robusta
intro: Crotalaria bupleurifolia var. robusta, also known as robust crotalaria, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the robust crotalaria plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments.
